title: Fagara stenophylla
taxonomy: Fagara stenophylla is classified as a species of plant in the Rutaceae family, which includes citrus and rue plants. It belongs to the genus Fagara and is native to tropical Africa. The classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf shape, flower structure, and fruit type. Fagara stenophylla is also known to be a member of the order Sapindales. The classification is further supported by its genetic and molecular analysis.
